title: Artificially inseminate livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Artificially inseminate livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for insemination of animals

pcs.text: Organise resources and personnel to ensure optimal timing of the insemination process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise resources and personnel to ensure optimal timing of the insemination process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise resources and personnel to ensure optimal timing of the insemination process.

pcs.text: Follow workplace animal welfare and hygiene practices, and biosecurity policies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace animal welfare and hygiene practices, and biosecurity policies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and store semen supplies.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Restrain and prepare intended recipient animal humanely and appropriately for insemination.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct insemination using techniques appropriate to animal type and applying correct hygiene procedures.
